recommendations.title: Bad Cat
recommendations.overview: A foul-mouthed cat and its gang cross paths with humans.

recommendations.title: The Heat
recommendations.overview: Uptight and straight-laced, FBI Special Agent Sarah Ashburn is a methodical investigator with a reputation for excellence--and hyper-arrogance. Shannon Mullins, one of Boston P.D.'s "finest," is foul-mouthed and has a very short fuse, and uses her gu

recommendations.title: The Death of Dick Long
recommendations.overview: Dick died last night, and Zeke and Earl don’t want anybody finding out how. That’s too bad though, cause news travels fast in small-town Alabama.

recommendations.title: The Ultimate Gift
recommendations.overview: When his wealthy grandfather finally dies, Jason Stevens fully expects to benefit when it comes to the reading of the will. But instead of a sizable inheritance, Jason receives a test, a series of tasks he must complete before he can get any money.

recommendations.title: Spring Breakdown
recommendations.overview: Three women in their thirties head to a popular Spring Break destination and try to relive the Spring Break they never had.

recommendations.title: Jason and the Argonauts
recommendations.overview: Jason, a fearless sailor and explorer, returns to his home land of Thessaly after a long voyage to claim his rightful throne. He learns, however, that he must first find the magical Golden Fleece. To do so, he must embark on an epic quest fraught wit

recommendations.title: School Dance
recommendations.overview: High schooler Jason has found his dream girl—the gorgeous Anastacia. There’s just one problem: she doesn’t know he exists. If he can win a spot on the school’s hottest dance crew, Jason might have a shot. But before he does, he’ll have to overcome hi

recommendations.title: The Big Kahuna
recommendations.overview: Three salesmen working for a firm that makes industrial lubricants are waiting in the company's "hospitality suite" at a manufacturers' convention for a "big kahuna" named Dick Fuller to show up, in hopes they can persuade him to place an order that

recommendations.title: Plan B
recommendations.overview: After a regrettable first sexual encounter, a straight-laced high school student and her slacker best friend have 24 hours to hunt down a Plan B pill in America's heartland.

recommendations.title: No Retreat, No Surrender
